CATPAEXExpandAllAction.Title: Expand All
CATPAEXExpandAllAction.ShortHelp: Expands all the children of the selected objects.
CATPAEXExpandNAction.Title: Expand N Levels
CATPAEXExpandNAction.ShortHelp: Expands N levels of the selected objects.
CATPAEXCollapseAllAction.Title: Collapse All
CATPAEXCollapseAllAction.ShortHelp: Collapses all the children of the selected objects.
CATPAEXSelectAllAction.Title: Select All Visible
CATPAEXSelectAllAction.ShortHelp: Selects all visible objects in the structure.
CATPAEXSelectChildrenAction.Title: Select Children
CATPAEXSelectChildrenAction.ShortHelp: Selects all the child objects of the selected objects recursively. The selected objects remains selected.
CATPAEXSelectInversionAction.Title: Select Inversion
CATPAEXSelectInversionAction.ShortHelp: Selects all the objects in the structure except the branch of the object you selected.
CATPAEXSelectParentAction.Title: Select Parent
CATPAEXSelectParentAction.ShortHelp: Selects the parent of the selected objects.
CATPAEXSelectParentAction.LongHelp: Selecting the parent object cancels the selection of the object you selected.
CATPAEXSelectSiblingsAction.Title: Select Siblings
CATPAEXSelectSiblingsAction.ShortHelp: Selects the sibling objects. Siblings are objects that share a parent with the currently selected object.
CATPAEXSelectSiblingsAction.LongHelp: Selecting the sibling objects cancels the selection of the object you selected.
CATPAEXSelectLeavesAction.Title: Select Leaves
CATPAEXSelectLeavesAction.ShortHelp: Selects the leaves of the selected objects. Leaves are objects that have no child object.
CATPAEXSelectLeavesAction.LongHelp: Selecting the leaf objects cancels the selection of the object you selected.
CATPAEXCleanViewAction.Title: Close
CATPAEXCleanViewAction.ShortHelp: Close all the objects from the view.
CATPAEXSetCow.Title: Set Center Of The World
CATPAEXResetCow.Title: Reset Center Of The World
CATPAEXcmd.Title: Positioning Architecture
CATPAEXcmd.ShortHelp: Opens the Positioning Architecture app and displays the positioning architecture.
